nasb.text: Now they found an Egyptian in the field and brought him to David, and gave him bread and he ate, and they provided him water to drink.

esv.text: They found an Egyptian in the open country and brought him to David. And they gave him bread and he ate. They gave him water to drink,

cnv.text: 他們在田野裡遇見一個埃及人，就把他帶到大衛那裡。他們給他飯吃，又給他水喝。

ccb.text: 他们在田野遇见一个埃及人，就把他带到大卫那里。他们给他饼吃，给他水喝，
